tasks.subject: Task 1: API — _is_valid_language_alternative + hreflang/data-lang gates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** API rejects hreflang/data-lang declarations whose target URL is a same-host non-language-shaped path (e.g. /nos-realisations).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py:324-330 (insert helper)
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py:678-685 (hreflang gate)
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py:687-697 (data-lang gate)
- Test: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_fr.py

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_domain_fr.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_fr.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_domain_fr.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Cross-host accepted","Same-host language-shaped accepted","Content paths rejected","Root rejected","Malformed rejected","Integration test passes","Existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Crawler — isFrenchRegionalPathPrefix helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a static helper on DetectionLangueClient that returns true only for path prefixes shaped like a French regional variant.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.ts:233
- Test: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/DetectionLangueClient.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Accepted shapes return true","Rejected shapes return false","Edge cases handled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Crawler — apply prefix gate in regional exclusion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Crawler only adds an alt URL's path prefix to context.excludedRegionalPaths when the prefix passes isFrenchRegionalPathPrefix.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts:418-440

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_DetectionLangueClient.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Non-language prefixes excluded","French shapes still added","Build succeeds","Tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Crawler — drop URL fallback after clean HTML rejection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When the API cleanly rejects a page via forced HTML detect, trust the verdict. Stop running checkUrl() URL-only fallback.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts:571-581

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_routes.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npx tsx src/tests/test_routes.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Clean rejection no longer overridden","No checkUrl call after rejection","Existing behavior preserved on ok=true","Build succeeds","Tests pass"]}
```
